fields.label: Logos
fields.hint:
If you want turn the logo into a link, add a custom data field.
1st field should be: pageUrl
2nd field is the url; please note that the url format is NOT checked. You are responsible for this yourself

fields.label: Full width
fields.hint: Has no effect on case page

fields.label: Language
fields.hint: Code language for prismjs classname

fields.label: Body
fields.hint: Code block

fields.label: Person
fields.hint: If filled in created yellow block with a picture to the left

fields.label: Secondary link url
fields.hint: Internal link use this format: '/nl/page-slug' or '/en/page-slug'.

fields.label: Image
fields.hint: Use a square illustration. Once displayed it will be 170x170px.

fields.label: Iframe title
fields.hint: The title of the embedded iframe

fields.label: Url
fields.hint: Format: https://codepen.io/[ user ]/embed/[ id ]?[ optional_params ]. Go to the codepen -> Embed -> Iframe -> then copy the source attribute value.

fields.label: Grid alignment
fields.hint: Only has effect on regular pages. Not on specific pages (like services etc.)

fields.label: Show table of contents
fields.hint: Only has effect on regular pages. Not on specific pages (like services etc.)

fields.label: Background color
fields.hint: Only has effect on regular pages. Not on specific pages (like services etc.)

fields.label: Theme
fields.hint: Section background color

fields.label: Accent Position
fields.hint: Display a yellow accent decoration and choose whether it appears on the left or right side.

fields.label: Is closed?
fields.hint: Closed jobs will remain online for search engine optimization reasons but will not be directly listed on the website. A banner explaining the position is closed will appear on the top of the page.

fields.label: Valid until
fields.hint: The date when the job posting will expire

fields.label: Url
fields.hint: Url of apply form on Homerun.

fields.label: Job description
fields.hint: The full description of the job. Used only for Google Jobs structured data and will be displayed in Google's Search results.

fields.label: Name
fields.hint: First name only.

fields.label: Image
fields.hint: Tip: use a square image.

fields.label: Is full width
fields.hint: Determine if image is placed full width in grid or not

fields.label: Is archived?
fields.hint: Archived blogposts will not appear in the blog overview but will remain accessible. A banner will be displayed on top explaning that they are outdated.

fields.label: OnMounted Script
fields.hint: Will be called after the component has mounted, so you have access to the DOM. If you are using web-components, make sure to check if custom element is already defined in the CustomElementRegistry before defining a new web-component (unregistering is not possible, so this is necessary to prevent runtime errors).

fields.label: OnUnmounted Script
fields.hint: Should be used to clean up artefacts from your `OnMounted` script.

fields.label: Body
fields.hint: If a service is linked on the home page and a body text is present, the service card on the home page will link to this service

fields.label: To
fields.hint: If pointing to a website page should end with a slash.

fields.label: HTTP status code
fields.hint: Options: 200 (OK), 301 (permanent redirect), 302 (temporary redirect), 404 (page not found)

fields.label: Identifier
fields.hint: This field isn't used in the code, but is used just to identify pivot sections in Dato

fields.label: ad Conversion Id
fields.hint: Id for google ads to track a conversion event on click CTA button

fields.label: Contact person
fields.hint: Only used for 'contact' form type

fields.label: Mailchimp Contact Group - Id
fields.hint: Value can be found at mailchimp.com > Audience > Embedded forms > Unstyled

fields.label: Mailchimp Contact Group - Name
fields.hint: Value can be found at mailchimp.com > Audience > Embedded forms > Unstyled

fields.label: Mailchimp Contact Group - Value
fields.hint: Value can be found at mailchimp.com > Audience > Embedded forms > Unstyled

fields.label: Identifier
fields.hint: This field isn't used in the code, but is used just to identify pivot sections in Dato

fields.label: Validated
fields.hint: Only validated testimonials will be shown

fields.label: Fullwidth
fields.hint: Shows testimonial in fullwidth now being used for case pages

fields.label: Slug
fields.hint: Changing this slug requires code changes!

fields.label: Name
fields.hint: Solely utilized within the CMS for identification purposes.

fields.label: Image
fields.hint: Always fill in the alt text

fields.label: Header illustration
fields.hint: Make sure to include no whitespace in the svg / png and have a height of 285px

fields.label: Service series
fields.hint: Multiple can be selected. The first item containing the previously visited service page will be shown. When there's no matches, the first item will be shown.

fields.label: Excerpt title
fields.hint: Used in overview pages (blue title)

fields.label: Card image
fields.hint: Image on service card

fields.label: Cta slug
fields.hint: Slug with the https://www.voorhoede.nl/:lang/ prefix
